title: Can You Spot the Order Block? 90% of Traders Fail This Test
description: Think you know ICT concepts? Test yourself on order blocks — the smart money setup most traders miss. R2F Trading quizzes you on one of the most powerful ICT trading concepts in 2026. How well do you really know your setups? Follow r2ftrading.com for daily ICT breakdowns, free resources, and funded trader coaching.
script: 90% of traders fail this. Can you spot the real order block? One wrong answer blows funded accounts. Look at this chart. Price drops hard. Then one candle closes bullish. Here's the question... Which candle IS the order block? A — the last bearish candle. B — the first bullish candle. C — the wick low. Most say B. That's wrong. The real order block is A — the LAST bearish candle before the move up. Why? Smart money left orders IN that bearish candle. Price returns to collect them. That's the entry. Miss this and you're entering 20 pips late. Every time. That's why your funded account keeps failing. Follow R2F Trading. We post setups like this every single day. r2ftrading.com — link in bio.
